name: Nine Energy Service, Inc.
summary: PART I Overview Nine Energy Service, Inc. (either individually or together with its subsidiaries, as the context requires, the Company, Nine, we, us, and our) is a Delaware corporation that was formed in February 2013 through a combination of three service companies owned by SCF Partners, L.P. or its affiliates.
